channel.title: Mistral AI - News & Updates
channel.description: Latest news, research, and product releases from Mistral AI

item.title: Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: Remote agents in Vibe. Powered by Mistral Medium 3.5.
item.description: Introducing Mistral Medium 3.5, remote coding agents in Vibe, plus new Work mode in Le Chat for complex tasks.

item.title: Workflows for work that runs the business
item.description: Workflows is now in public preview.

item.title: Connect the dots: Build with built-in and custom MCPs in Studio
item.description: Connect enterprise data to your AI applications with reusable connectors, direct tool calling, and human-in-the-loop approval controls.

item.title: Two users, one CLI: people and agents
item.description: Designing for agents forced us to build better tools, starting with our internal ones.

item.title: Speaking of Voxtral
item.description: Voxtral TTS: A frontier, open-weights text-to-speech model that’s fast, instantly adaptable, and produces lifelike speech for voice agents.

item.title: Introducing Forge
item.description: Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge.

item.title: Mistral AI partners with NVIDIA to accelerate open frontier models
item.description: As a founding member of the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition, Mistral AI is contributing large-scale model development and multimodal capabilities.

item.title: Leanstral: Open-Source foundation for trustworthy vibe-coding
item.description: First open-source code agent for Lean 4.
